raw.objective: “In this study, we examined the effect of CYP2C9/19 mutations on the stereoselective hydroxylation of PHT and performed a population pharmacokinetic analysis in medium-sized Japanese adult patients with epilepsy who were receiving long-term PHT therapy”
raw.covariates: Tested: WT, comedications, genotype (CYP2C9/19) on Vm and Km Included: WT, comedications, genotype (CYP2C9/19) on Vm
raw.observations: CYP2C9 and CYP2C19 have significant impacts on Vm and Km.
raw.equations: GTVm = theta4**G4 GTKm = theta5**G2+theta6**G3 Vm = theta1*((WT/60)**theta3)*GTVm*(1+eta1) Km = theta2*GTKm*(1+eta2) DD=(Vm*Css)/(F*(Km+Css))*(1+eps1) G2 is belonging to genetic group 2 (0=no; 1=yes) G3 is belonging to genetic group 3 (0=no; 1=yes) G4 is belonging to genetic group 4 (0=no; 1=yes) F is bioavailability (fixed to 1 here) Formulae were converted from mg/day/kg to mg/day for ease of use. The additive error term eps1 was also converted, using the typical Vm, Km, and Css (6.07, 4.0, and 7.8 respectively)
raw.parameter_values: theta1= 6.07 theta2= 4.0 theta3= 0.584 theta4= 0.582 theta5= 1.22 theta6= 1.54 omega1=0.0123 omega2=0.0520 sigma1=0.00752

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: GTVm = theta4**G4 GTKm = theta5**G2+theta6**G3 Vm = theta1*((WT/60)**theta3)*GTVm*(1+eta1) Km = theta2*GTKm*(1+eta2) DD=(Vm*Css)/(F*(Km+Css))*(1+eps1) G2 is belonging to genetic group 2 (0=no; 1=yes) G3 is belonging to genetic group 3 (0=no; 1=yes) G4 is belonging to genetic group 4 (0=no; 1=yes) F is bioavailability (fixed to 1 here) Formulae were converted from mg/day/kg to mg/day for ease of use. The additive error term eps1 was also converted, using the typical Vm, Km, and Css (6.07, 4.0, and 7.8 respectively)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “In this study, we examined the effect of CYP2C9/19 mutations on the stereoselective hydroxylation of PHT and performed a population pharmacokinetic analysis in medium-sized Japanese adult patients with epilepsy who were receiving long-term PHT therapy”

covariates.raw: Tested: WT, comedications, genotype (CYP2C9/19) on Vm and Km Included: WT, comedications, genotype (CYP2C9/19) on Vm

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
